description: A builder template for assembling a commute/work outfit recommendation workflow from reusable nodes.
default_query: 서울 내일 출근 포멀 옷 추천해줘

node_palette.name: Commute Request Parser Node
node_palette.role: Extract city, date, commute purpose, user and preferred style from the user request.

node_palette.name: Commute Question Node
node_palette.role: Ask for missing commute context such as destination city, date, dress code or style.

node_palette.name: Weather Tool Node
node_palette.role: Call the weather tool and normalize weather data for the commute date.

node_palette.name: Wardrobe History Analysis Node
node_palette.role: Load purchase history and find work-friendly style preferences.

node_palette.name: Commute Recommendation Node
node_palette.role: Match weather, commute purpose and shopping analysis with outfit ranking rules.

node_palette.name: Commute Compose Node
node_palette.role: Render the final commute outfit recommendation answer.

question_agent.clarification_message: 출근/통근 상황 정보가 부족합니다. 도시, 날짜, 드레스코드나 선호 스타일을 알려주세요.

clarification_questions.city: 어느 도시의 출근/통근 날씨를 기준으로 추천할까요? (예: 서울, 인천)
clarification_questions.date: 언제 입을 출근복인가요? (예: 내일, 다음 주)
clarification_questions.purpose_or_style: 출근/회의/면접 같은 상황이나 포멀/미니멀 같은 선호 스타일을 알려주세요.
